name: Prize Winning Applesauce Brownies
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine the applesauce and sugar. Blend well.
2. Beat in the eggs one at a time. Add the vanilla and beat well.
3. Add the flour and cocoa powder; beat well.
4. Stir in the baking powder and salt.
5. Mix in the nuts and chocolate chips.
6. Pour the batter into a greased 13 x 9-inch baking pan.
7. Bake at 350°F for 30-35 minutes.
8. Cool completely before cutting.
